message:
Cache agent-metrics to disk so rate-limit failures don't blank indicators

- Write successful agent-metrics.sh output to agent-metrics-cache.json
- Load cache from disk on startup for instant data before first fetch
- Fall back to cached data when agent-metrics.sh fails (rate limit/timeout)
- Increase agent-metrics.sh timeout from 15s to 30s

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
